title: ApiProject
description: Represents an API project in the Sideko platform that contains OpenAPI specifications and generated tooling.

id.description: Unique identifier of the API project

name.description: Human-readable name of the API project

description.description: Optional description of the API and its purpose

slug.description: URL-safe kebab-case identifier for the project

versionCount.description: Number of API specification versions uploaded to this project

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the project was created

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the project was last modified
